wine_retailers.name: El Market Vinos y Vinagretas
wine_retailers.address: Calle Consistorio 8, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Central Jerez wine shop specialising in the Jerez DO with the widest selection of VORS and VOSJ bottlings in the city. Almacenista and small-production releases sit alongside the major house ranges; knowledgeable staff guide selection.
wine_retailers.price_range: EUR 8 entry-level Fino to EUR 350 VORS aged releases

verified.address_quoted: C/ Consistorio, 8, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: Cooperativa Agricola Vitivinicola San Isidro
wine_retailers.address: Calle Taxdirt 12, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: The San Isidro cooperative bodega sells directly to the public from its on-site shop. The range covers cooperatively produced Fino, Amontillado and Oloroso at cellar-door prices well below the major house bottlings; good for everyday sherry.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Taxdirt, 12, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: Vinos del Marco
wine_retailers.address: Calle San Juan 18, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Sanlucar wine shop dedicated to the wines of the Marco de Jerez with a particular focus on Manzanilla from local bodegas. The shop stocks En Rama seasonal releases from Barbadillo, La Guita and Hidalgo that are rarely available outside the region.

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Juan, 18, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda

wine_retailers.name: Lustau Bodega Shop
wine_retailers.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: The on-site retail shop at Bodegas Lustau carries the full current range of Lustau sherries plus back-vintage Almacenista releases and gift sets unavailable in standard retail. Prices reflect direct-from-bodega supply.
wine_retailers.price_range: EUR 8 Fino to EUR 280 VORS Almacenista

verified.address_quoted: C/ Arcos, 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: La Cava del Vino
wine_retailers.address: Calle Torneria 4, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Independent wine shop in central Jerez stocking the full range of Jerez DO bottlings alongside Cadiz province still wines and a small Spanish national selection. Staff offer guided tastings in the back room by appointment.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Torneria, 4, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: Vino y Manzanilla
wine_retailers.address: Calle Luna 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
wine_retailers.neighborhood: El Puerto de Santa Maria centro
wine_retailers.description: El Puerto de Santa Maria wine shop stocking the full range from the Osborne bodega as well as a curated selection of Manzanilla from Sanlucar and Fino from Jerez producers. Tasting notes provided on request.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Luna, 7, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

wine_retailers.name: Gonzalez Byass Bodega Shop
wine_retailers.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: The on-site shop at Gonzalez Byass carries the full Tio Pepe range, VORS aged expressions, Alfonso Oloroso and Alfonso Cream gift sets, plus Lepanto Brandy de Jerez and branded accessories. Large-format bottles and library editions sold exclusively here.
wine_retailers.price_range: EUR 10 Tio Pepe to EUR 400 Amontillado del Duque VORS

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: Taberna y Vinos del Guerrero
wine_retailers.address: Calle Bolsa 22, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Sanlucar combination wine shop and tasting bar focused exclusively on the Manzanilla sub-zone. The shop wall holds 80+ Manzanilla and Manzanilla Pasada bottlings including rare small-production almacenistas from local families.

wine_retailers.name: El Rincón del Sherry
wine_retailers.address: Calle Lanceria 18, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Jerez sherry specialist on the pedestrian Lanceria, focused on hard-to-find bottlings from across the Marco de Jerez. The shop curates VORS aged releases, single-solera almacenistas and seasonal En Rama editions for sherry enthusiasts.
specialties: Brandy de Jerez Solera Gran Reserva

verified.address_quoted: C/ Lanceria, 18, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_retailers.name: Vinoteca San Francisco
wine_retailers.address: Calle San Francisco 14, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_retailers.description: A modern wine shop in central Jerez with a mixed cellar spanning Jerez DO and Spanish national denominations. The sherry section is the most comprehensive, with staff trained by the Consejo Regulador on classification and serving recommendations.

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Francisco, 14, Jerez de la Frontera
